query: We want to give our app teams a self-service way to ship to EKS without filing infra tickets. How do we build an Internal Developer Platform?
Set up Backstage software templates so developers can scaffold a new service with a CI/CD pipeline on our EKS platform.
We're standardizing how teams deploy — I want golden paths with ArgoCD and a canary rollout that auto-rolls-back. How should the platform be wired?
How do I let developers self-provision a DynamoDB table from a portal without touching AWS directly? Thinking ACK + Backstage.
We need multi-stage promotion from dev to prod for the same image with a manual approval gate. Should we use Kargo, and how does it fit with ArgoCD?
Our platform team wants developers to describe apps without learning Kubernetes YAML. How do we use OAM/KubeVela components and traits?
How do we actually measure whether our internal developer platform is working — what DORA metrics and tooling should we put in place?
Extend our EKS platform so ML engineers can self-serve model serving with Ray and data engineers can run Spark jobs from Backstage.
We're standing up a new EKS cluster. Should the data plane be Karpenter, managed node groups, or EKS Auto Mode?
What PDBs, probes, and topology spread constraints should we set for production reliability on our EKS workloads?
What Kubernetes version is my EKS cluster on right now, and which add-ons are installed?
Is my cluster ready to upgrade to 1.33? Give me a readiness score and tell me what's blocking it.
Audit my EKS cluster's operational posture and rate each area GREEN, AMBER, or RED.
How do I install the EKS MCP server and connect it to my AI assistant so I can query live clusters?
Explain how Kubernetes StatefulSet rolling updates work at the controller level.
Write a standalone Terraform module with native tests for provisioning an S3 bucket.
